name: Chocolate Waffle Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and butter until fluffy.
2. Add the eggs and vanilla; beat well.
3. Stir together the flour, cocoa, baking powder, cinnamon, and 1/2 tsp salt.
4. Mix this dry ingredient blend into the creamed mixture.
5. Gently fold in the chopped nuts (the batter will be stiff).
6. Drop spoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto a pre-heated waffle baker.
7. Bake for about 1 1/2 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Cool on a rack.
9. Sift powdered sugar over the cooled waffles.
Makes about 48.
